__warnings.note: 'Rwendo' is the brand name and the Shona word for 'journey'. Stays as-is.
Mirrored as 'Mhoro' (the proverb) — the en version's 'Every journey begins with hello' is itself referencing the Shona greeting. Reviewer: confirm.
These continue an English sentence fragment after a hyperlink. Translation reads as continuation. Reviewer should test the rendered sentence flows naturally with the link in the middle.
Legal age-of-consent text. Translation tries to preserve the parental-consent caveat. Reviewer: must be precise.
AI disclosure consent. Translation aims for clarity that Rwen is not human. Reviewer: must be unambiguous in Shona.
'ChiShona' kept as endonym — the language calls itself ChiShona.
Modern gender terms — Shona has limited established translations. 'Risina basa kuti chii' is a literal 'doesn't matter what'. Reviewer should pick wording that's respectful AND understood.
Marketing copy. Literal translations — reviewer free to rewrite for natural flow.
Self-assessment phrases. Literal translations are stiff; reviewer should rewrite naturally.
First-person quotes ('I'm scared to speak'). Translation uses Shona equivalents. Reviewer: confirm tone.
Place names — kept as-is (already in their endonyms).
Long-form policy text about minors. Literal translation. Reviewer should ensure compliance language is clear in Shona.
Multiline placeholder with example phrases. Examples translated, format preserved.
Three path-specific completion lines. Tonally celebratory. Reviewer free to rewrite for natural flow.
'Change anytime in Profile' references the Profile tab — translation matches whatever common.nav.profile is.

welcome.title: Rwendo
welcome.subtitle: Rwendo rwose runotanga ne'Mhoro'
welcome.tagline: Dzidza chero mutauro naRwen, shamwari yako yeAI

sign_in.title: Tigashire zvakare
sign_in.subtitle: Pinda kuti uenderere mberi nerwendo rwako
sign_in.missing_body: Ndapota nyora email yako nepassword yako.

sign_up.title: Vhura account
sign_up.subtitle: Joinha Rwendo utange rwendo rwako
sign_up.consent_terms_post: , kusanganisira clause ye-arbitration uye class action waiver muSection 15
sign_up.consent_privacy_post: , kusanganisira sezvinoita dhata yangu inogadziriswa neAnthropic (Claude AI) uye ElevenLabs (izwi)
sign_up.consent_age: Ndinosimbisa kuti ndine makore 13 kana kupfuura (kana mubereki/mutarisiri ari kubvuma terms idzi mukuti idi remudiki ane makore 13-17)
sign_up.consent_ai: Ndinonzwisisa kuti Rwen ihungwaru hwekugadzira (AI), kwete munhu, uye mhinduro dzeAI dzinogona kuva nekanganiso uye hadzisi mazano evanyanzvi
sign_up.consent_hint: Ndapota bvuma zvinhu zvose zviri pamusoro kuti uenderere mberi
sign_up.check_email_body: Tatumira link yekusimbisa kuna {{email}}. Dzvanya kuti uvhure account yako, wozopinda.

learn.title: Dzidza Mutauro
learn.desc: Zvidzidzo zvakarongeka, XP, tsvarara — svika paA2 fluency uchitungamirwa naRwen.

companion.title: Gadzira Shamwari yeAI
companion.desc: Rwen anova shamwari yako — taurai, sekai, mukura pamwe chete.

travel.title: Travel Mode
travel.desc: Bhuku remashoko, mutungamiri wetsika, uye nzira dzeZimbabwe.

basics.label: Ndinoziva mashoko mashoma
basics.desc: Mhoro, sara zvakanaka, zvichida zvimwe zvishoma

friend.label: Shamwari
friend.desc: Munhu wokutaurirana naye uye kugovana zuva rangu

support.label: Rutsigiro rwemoyo
support.desc: Munhu anoteerera nemoyo wose pamazuva akaoma

step_age.title: Wakaberekwa rini?
step_age.sub: Unofanira kuva ne13 kana kupfuura kuti ushandise Rwendo

step_learn_connection.title: Pane munhu chaiye waunoda kutaura naye {{lang}} here?
step_learn_connection.sub: Hazvisi zvinodiwa — zvinoita rutsigiro rwaRwen rwakanaka

date.note: Vashandisi vasati vasvika 13 havakwanisi kushandisa Rwendo. Vashandisi 13–17 vane zvinhu zvine miganhu.

blocked.title: Unofanira kuva ne18+
blocked.body: Rwendo ikozvino inoda kuti vashandisi vave ne18 kana kupfuura kuti vapinde zvinhu zvose — kusanganisira shamwari yeAI.
blocked.family_plan_body:
Tiri kugadzira Family Plan inotenderera vashandisi vane makore 13–17 (kana 16+ muAustralia) kushandisa Rwendo nekubvumirwa nemubereki.

Iri kuzoshanda sei:
• Mubereki anodhownirodha Rwendo
• Mubereki anopedza identity verification
• Mubereki anowedzera email yako uye anogadzira kodhi
• Iwe unopinza kodhi kuti upinde paaccount yako
• Mubereki anogona kuongorora zviri kuitwa nokwawunoda

onboarding.connection_placeholder:
semuenzaniso "Ambuya vangu vekuHarare"
"Mhuri yemudiwa wangu"

Siyira zvisina kuzadzwa kuti usianise.

complete.title: Wakwanisa zvose!
complete.text_companion: Rwen agadzirira kusangana newe. Rwendo rwenyu pamwe chete runotanga zvino.
complete.text_learn: Rwendo rwako rweShona runotanga. Rwen achavapo nemi nhambwe yega yega.
complete.text_travel: Rwendo rwako rweZimbabwe runotanga pano. Rwen agadzirira.
